description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a short-sleeved, buttoned jumpsuit with a V-neck collar and visible seams. The jumpsuit features a patch with the word 'WOEF' on the back and a smaller label on the chest. The figure has a bald head, a tattoo on the right forearm, and is wearing ankle cuffs and wristbands, suggesting a prison or detention context. The hands are relaxed and open, and the figure is wearing casual, low-top shoes with visible laces and soles. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and subtle muscle definition. The surface texture of the clothing and skin is matte, with some visible creases and folds in the fabric.
description: A bald adult male in a buttoned jumpsuit with wrist and ankle cuffs, tattooed forearm, and casual shoes, resembling a prison inmate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-neck jumpsuit, chest label, tattooed right forearm, and relaxed hand posture.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm tattoo, and the fit of the jumpsuit along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the 'WOEF' patch on the back, bald head, and the back seams of the jumpsuit.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, wristband, and the overall silhouette of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved buttoned jumpsuit with wrist and ankle cuffs
